title: Bump ComfyUI v0.27.0 -> v0.28.0 (node_lock + Pod image + Builder parity)
description: Bump ComfyUI v0.27.0 -> v0.28.0 across node_lock.json (core tag+commit, frontend/template pins), system_dependencies.json (LOCAL engine), the mpi-ci build-context lock copy, and the Builder COMFYUI_REF (MPI-183, retargeted). Drivers, in order of relevance to us: Qwen3-VL tokenizer crash fixes (we ship qwen3vl_4b as the Krea2 edit CLIP and the image describer), int8/int4 optimizations (Turing/16xx-targeted = a LOCAL-GPU win, not a Pod one), PID 1.5 support, a text-model sampling speedup and a VAE AttributeError fix. No breaking changes stated. NOTE: the Krea2 grounded/inpainting capability turned out NOT to be core-gated - it is the comfyui-krea2edit node we already ship, so check a node commit bump (volume-resident, no image needed) BEFORE assuming this bump unlocks it. Apply the pin rule first (memory project_comfyui_bump_cadence). Ships as ONE dev image bundled with MPI-341. Full detail in brief.md.
